creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bug 266141 has the alias 'tensorflow', which allows issues to be searched under custom names. 

We've wanted to disable aliases in the past for this and other reasons, but at least one group uses aliases and has expressed a desire not to remove/disable/hide the feature.

In the meantime, one may remove aliases if and where necessary, such that they do not match search queries. I've removed the tensorflow alias from that issue.
